SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 2 

Anti-Launch Launch



Ry Schwartz & Copyhackers

2020



SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 2

About This Template:

What we’re “selling”:

Where to Use it:

How to Use It:

Exploratory Questions

Template

See it in action:

Example 1: 10x Emails









About This Template: 



It’s a known and accepted fact that the majority of sales will roll in during the FINAL 48 hours of a launch or evergreen campaign. 



While it’s not difficult to know why this happens (urgency and loss aversion), most marketers fail to unpack this further while missing out on the benefits of front-loading more sales from the start.



Benefits of Front-Loading More Sales in Your Launch:



Cash-flow to re-invest in ads/retargeting

Validation for you and your affiliate partners

Confidence to market aggressively until the end

Social Proof (fb group, case studies, testimonials, etc.) to use in closing emails. 

More buyer behavior data (ie. surveys on Thank You page) 

Better priming for your closing sequence (you want them to be “close” right from the start) 

Creating urgency earlier on (especially if there’s a limited #) 

What we’re “coaching”:

Progress & Sustained Momentum

The Burning Fire (How their version of “Rome” burning)

A small step instead of a GIANT leap 

Consistency with a positive trait (& distancing from a negative one like procrastination). 

A more advantageous situation (& the cost of waiting) 



Where to use it:

As a launch day announcement email (for a live launch) 

As one of the very first sales emails / offer announcement emails in an evergreen campaign





How to Use It: 

Exploratory Questions



What micro-actions have they ALREADY taken that you can hold them consistent to? How are they already in the process? 



In what ways is “Rome Burning” for them? How has it been burning for long before you came along? 



How will your prospect be in a worse position if they buy in a few days? (what will the fire have already consumed between now and then? What benefits are they leaving on the table?) 



How have they been trying (and struggling) to put out the fire? 



How is a product “launch” disingenuous to you? What proprietary elements have been in development/testing/being proven for months or years? 



What results or case studies can you point to? 





Template



[announce that the offer is now live]

[social proof and/or a core benefit of the product] 

[bridge into WHY it’s not an actual “launch”] 

[Rome is Burning moment - what’s burning - how are they trying to extinguish?] 

[Describe the existing context/problem as SPECIFICALLY as you can] 

[Remind them that the fire has been burning long before you got there] 

[Why it’s not a launch for you (credibility + proof + case studies)] 

[Call out a negative trait (ie. procrastination) + hold them consistent to a higher standard] 

[CTA - which shows naturalness - continuation - small step]

[Remind them of cost of waiting. What will be left of Rome?]

[CTA 2] 

[Optional: use the PS to disarm 1 or 2 key objections] 





See it in action: 

Example 1: 10x Emails 



In case you missed it, we just opened the doors to our 10x Emails Course.

An awesome crowd of growth-minded marketers, entrepreneurs and copywriters has already punched its one-way ticket to email glory.

(The Team Plan has made that really affordable for bigger groups. You'll see it here)

Those fine folks are set to start generating revenue from the first few lessons alone.

And the templates!

We almost never offer templates 'round these parts.

We'd rather teach you to fish than hand you a templated fish.

But we've got 4 email copy templates for you in 10x Emails.

Four templated emails based on emails we've written that've brought in five figures with a single send. Four templates doesn't sound like a lot? Well it's a drop in the bucket of awesomeness that is 10x Emails. And it really only takes one solid email to cover your investment fast.

(Challenge for you: try popping the “Upgraded FAQ” email into your existing drip sequence and NOT getting New Sale notifications pronto-tonto. Truly.)

And while 10x Emails might just be the best thing we’ve ever shipped at Copy Hackers…

To call it a “launch” would be nothing short of blasphemous.

To you.

To us.

To the email marketing overlords who watch over your every move deciding if THIS is gonna be the day YOU finally have a major revenue breakthrough.

(Hint: it could be)

Cause here’s the thing...

Nothing has actually “launched.”

Here's what I mean by that...

>>> You’ve already been hard at it, struggling to achieve just a sliver of those paydays, launches and user upgrades you keep reading posts about.

>>> You already have a subscriber list (or a client's list) (or a list of trial users) that’s ready to be profited from. The struggle is transforming that list of watchers into a list of customers. What aren't you telling them that they need to hear? Why does it seem so easy for other businesses... and so damn hard for yours?? Is there something wrong with your list? Or something wrong with your offering?

And…

>>> You already own or work for an early or growth-stage business that needs to maximize the ROI of every asset if it’s going to hit those lofty benchmarks everyone agreed to on that Google Hangout two weeks ago... back when it all seemed so simple... back before you actually tried to, y'know, generate revenue...

See? Nothing has launched for you.

You're knee deep in it.

And on our side...

YES, it’s true that this is the first time we’ll be putting many of these strategies and templates on display outside of our private 1-on-1 client work…

But nothing has launched here either.

>>> The strategies and techniques you’ll learn inside 10x Emails have all been rigorously tested and proven broadly. To be clear: we've used them for our business AND for our clients in ecommerce, SaaS, high-end consulting services, B2B, B2C. We've tested 'em. Made mistakes. Corrected mistakes. Brought in 3.5x lift. All that good stuff you expect from Copy Hackers.

>>> The templates you’ll use to crank out your highest-converting sales emails ever (seriously - and in half the time it takes you to painfully squeeze out the low-converting stuff) have been hard at work generating hundreds of thousands of dollars for private clients.

>>> And the live implementation workshops you’ll get to attend next month have been meticulously planned and engineered for this outcome: so you can walk away with the WRITTEN emails that can literally 10x your investment in 10x Emails the second you hit “send.”

So YES.

While you'll now have access to EVERYTHING you need to turn email into that powerful, low-cost lever... the one that can help you put money in the bank and hire people and upgrade your laptops and buy the unbranded versions of your favorite software and splurge on grande frappuccinos for your whole crew....

Nothing. Has. Launched.

Cool?

Glad we could get that all cleared up.

When you’re ready, here’s your chance to take everything you’re ALREADY doing, and make it up to 10X more profitable.

~Jo

P.S. In spite of the rumors, email marketing does not come down to dumb luck.

Nor does it come down to One Size Fits All.

It's about learning and applying a proven, repeatable set of email copywriting techniques - that's the difference between emails that convert and emails that, like, induce Unsubscribe Whiplash.

(That's what happens when your email copy is so wrong your subscriber can't move fast enough to the unsubscribe link. Not to be confused with Keyboard Face, where your dull-dull-dull email copy knocks your subscriber into a super-slumber right at her desk.) 

Proven. Repeatable. Set of techniques. That creates awesomeness.

That's what we're talking about in 10x Emails.

ALL ZEE LESSONS - none of that slow burn nonsense - are waiting for you inside the 10x Emails Members area.

Enroll now and I’ll shoot you over your login within 90 seconds.

P.P.S. “Training Program” is also a total misnomer.

The goal of 10x Emails isn’t to cram you full of concepts and jargon that make you look 5% smarter at your next marketing conference.

(If you wanna look smart, just name drop Eugene Schwartz every chance you get. Done.)

The goal here is much more direct:

To arm you with the high action techniques that you can put to work (and profit from) IMMEDIATELY.

Know what to write. Why you're writing it. And how to make it killer.

No messin’ around.

No going through a 50-hour, Costco-sized video library.

Most of our videos are about 5 minutes long, actually.

We all too busy 10x’n.

P.P.P.S. If you have:

An underperforming email rotting away in your drip sequence

A product or service your subscribers NEED to believe in

Someone that keeps hinting you're not quite cut out for the job of generating revenue with email (I totally worked with that guy once)

A client you really wanna WOW the crap out of

A boss that would be faaar more likely to lay down a bigger, better bonus for you if you brought in faaar more revenue and made it look easy

Or an investor you want to show some phenom growth reports to



Then every minute you spend *waiting* to join the super-affordable 10x Emails program is another minute you could’ve been doing this: writing and sending the email that gives your CFO a special tingly feeling.

Time to make ’em all happy. :-)

Enroll in 10x Emails Today
